Metadata.title: El Ouatik Frères
Metadata.description: Engineering and solutions for your projects.

Hero.subtitle: From algorithmic design to final delivery, we redefine how work is executed—with data discipline and flawless field execution.
Hero.subheadline: Secure your construction budgets and deadlines. We combine field expertise and Artificial Intelligence (BIM, IoT) to run your sites in real time.

Consulting.title: People before tools—for transformations that last.
Consulting.pillar1Text: We start from field friction before discussing tools, automation, or dashboards.
Consulting.pillar2Text: Every digital building block is tuned to your packages, constraints, and validation cycles.
Consulting.pillar3Text: Teams adopt solutions better when they serve day-to-day execution first.
Consulting.alertBody: 70% of digital transformations fail due to weak operational grounding.

Story.imageAlt: Two partners on a construction site with safety helmets reviewing a plan on a tablet—field and digital expertise
Story.eyebrow: THE STORY OF EL OUATIKI FRÈRES
Story.title: Field experience. The power of data.
Story.p1: At EL OUATIKI FRÈRES, construction is a family story. After years on sites managing teams and surprises, we set out to solve construction's biggest problem: lack of synchronization.
Story.p2: We transformed our DNA to combine traditional know-how with Artificial Intelligence (BIM, IoT, computer vision).
Story.p3: Today we are not just a technology company. We are builders giving your teams tomorrow's tools.

Method.title: From bit to concrete: intelligence at the heart of the site
Method.subtitle: Each card opens a level of detail: indicators, operational use, and direct impact on field profitability—the elouatikifreres process end to end.

BimCompare.title: Technological mastery: data becomes reality
BimCompare.hint: Drag to compare the digital model and the construction site.

Methodology.title: A clear timeline of decisions—from initial diagnosis to digital as-built documentation.
Methodology.cta: Start with an audit of my sites
Methodology.step1Desc: In-depth analysis of your business processes and sites to pinpoint logistics friction. Together we define a digital roadmap and clear KPIs before any intervention.
Methodology.step2Desc: Create a smart digital model to simulate costs, proactively detect design clashes, and validate technical choices before breaking ground.
Methodology.step3Desc: Real-time supervision through data analysis. We optimize scheduling, sync teams, and automate reporting to protect schedule and budget.
Methodology.step4Desc: Handover of a 100% digitized as-built file. Beyond the keys, we deliver a ready-to-use data asset for maintenance and future operations.

Realisations.title: Operations structured like data products.
Realisations.cell1Body: AI-driven rehabilitation: daily trade-offs between progress, margin, and material availability.
Realisations.cell2Body: Computer-vision tracking that cut idle time by 25% and smoothed subcontractor logistics access.
Realisations.cell2VisualAria: Logistics tower project visual — photo coming soon
Realisations.cell3Body: Automated capture of field facts and centralized proof of execution for stakeholders.
Realisations.cell4VisualAria: As-built delivery project — replace with photo

Contact.title: Simulate your site and get an initial framing.
Contact.intro: Ready to transform how your sites are executed? Describe your project in a few lines for a first simulation and strategic framing from our experts.
Contact.formHint: Fill in this form to get a simulation and strategic framing.
Contact.trustTitle: Join the leaders who trust us with their complex construction sites.
Contact.trustBody: Public institutions, industrial groups, and infrastructure operators rely on our field + data approach to de-risk critical operations.
Contact.trustProof: A clear request, a first expert response, then a framing focused on budget, schedule, and operational risks.

Form.successBody: Thank you for your trust. Your request has been sent to our team. An El Ouatiki Frères expert will contact you within 48 hours for an initial framing.
Form.subject: Acknowledgement: Your project with EL OUATIKI FRÈRES
Form.attachmentHint: PDF, Word, archives, DWG, or images—max 15 MB recommended. For larger files (BIM models, complex plans), add a WeTransfer or Google Drive link in the message.
Form.configError: Incomplete configuration: add NEXT_PUBLIC_WEB3FORMS_ACCESS_KEY to your environment file.
Form.sendFailed: Sending failed. Check the fields or try again later.
Form.errPhoneDigits: The number must contain at least 10 digits.
Form.errAttachment: File exceeds 15 MB (hosting limit). Use a WeTransfer or Google Drive link in the message.
Form.step1Title: What type of project would you like to simulate?
Form.step1Hint: Choose the closest context: we will adapt the simulation to your business constraints.
Form.step2Title: What is the estimated project budget?
Form.step2Hint: A range is enough to calibrate the level of analysis, BIM, and data-driven control.
Form.step3Title: Tell us more about your stakes (Optional)
Form.step3Hint: This step is optional. Add context, a critical deadline, or plans if you already have them.
Form.step4Title: Where should we send your simulation and action plan?
Form.step4Hint: We use this information only to send the simulation and organize the first framing call.
Form.placeholderMessageOptional: E.g. delay reduction, BIM clash detection, cost/schedule control, digital as-built file…
Form.dropzoneTitle: Drop your plans here or click to attach a file

Partners.title: They trust us
Partners.subtitle: Major players in construction, public service, and innovation rely on our method to de-risk complex project delivery.

Footer.tagline: Elouatiki Frères: the union of construction expertise and predictive intelligence.
Footer.address: 179 LOT KAMILA, ROUTE D'AGOURAI, 50000 MEKNES, MOROCCO

bim.drawerDesc: Digital models, clash detection, and data-driven trade-offs from design to protect cost and schedule.
bim.b1b: Multi-package aggregation with automatic collision rules before execution.
bim.b2b: BIM extraction tied to BOQs to track budget vs. actual variance.
bim.b3b: Recovery scenarios and digital evidence for owner / contractor coordination.
bim.cardDesc: Digital models, clash detection, and data trade-offs from design to protect cost and schedule.

logistics.drawerTitle: The right material, in the right place, at the right second.
logistics.drawerDesc: On a traditional site, 30% of time is lost waiting. Our AI connects your supply chain to real field progress.
logistics.b1b: The algorithm anticipates co-activity conflicts and equipment saturation days ahead.
logistics.b2b: Deliveries triggered exactly when the crew is ready. Major cut in material waste.
logistics.b3b: When surprises hit (weather, delays), AI recalculates the critical path and reallocates crews instantly.
logistics.cardDesc: Fine scheduling, material flows, and crew sync driven by live site data.

tracking.drawerTitle: The site becomes a smart environment.
tracking.drawerDesc: With IoT sensors and computer vision, we turn every field action into reliable, traceable, actionable data for full quality control.
tracking.b1b: AI compares as-built work to BIM and automatically checks safety compliance.
tracking.b2b: Each step is photographed, geotagged, and validated on tablet. Full traceability.
tracking.b3b: Connected probes for concrete curing or live weather to trigger the next tasks at the ideal moment.
tracking.cardDesc: Sensors, automated reporting, and field KPIs for full visibility on execution.

management.closeAria: Close delivery and digital twin panel
management.badge: Digital twin and as-built file in sync
management.drawerTitle: From handover to operations: a fully digital asset.
management.drawerDesc: Delivery is not the end—it's the pivot to long-term value. We consolidate the as-built file, compliance evidence, and operations twin so every post-handover decision rests on current, structured, usable data.
management.b1b: Consistent files, traceable evidence, and package close-out without document friction.
management.b2b: BIM enriched with as-builts and sensors to run the asset as a living system.
management.b3b: Dashboards and integrations to extend profitability and cut hidden lifecycle costs.
management.cardDesc: Handover, digital as-built, and operations twin to extend asset value after delivery.
